name: Green Algae (Ulvophyceae)
description: Green algae are a group of photosynthetic organisms found almost everywhere. They can be unicellular or multicellular. They play a role as primary producers in ecosystems, forming the base of many food webs. Green algae are also useful in several industries, including fertilizer production, wastewater treatment, and construction materials.
characteristics: Form base of many food webs
